Specification

Product Information

Item Code:W2275P149764

Product Type:General Item

Product Name:Outdoor 8 Person Picnic Table, 8 person Round Picnic Table with 4 Built-in Benches, Umbrella Hole, Outside Table and Bench Set for Garden, Backyard, Porch, Patio, Natural

Main Color:Natural，Brown

Main Material:Wood+Metal

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (in.):70.08

Assembled Width (in.):70.08

Assembled Height (in.):27.17

Weight (lbs.):60.50

Package Size Outer Package Images

Length (in.):46.65

Width (in.):30.12

Height (in.):8.27

Weight (lbs.):72.82

Product Features

  • The picnic table wood that is durable, burr-free and weather-resistant to make it withstand the changing weather for longer outdoor service time while coming with a strong loading capacity up to 500lbs per bench
  • Seating for Up to 8 People: This outdoor picnic table is designed with four built-in benches, each offering ample space for comfortable seating, accommodating a total of 8 people at once. Additionally, there is plenty of legroom provided for ultimate comfort. As a result, this outdoor wooden round picnic table is always prepared to host your outdoor gatherings.
  • Convenient Umbrella Hole: The round tabletop features a built-in 2" umbrella hole at the center, perfect for accommodating most standard patio umbrellas (umbrella not included), allowing for a more relaxed outdoor experience. Additionally, the fixed hole ensures that the umbrella stays securely in place.
  • Featuring a natural wood grain design, this outdoor picnic table and bench seat adds a charming rustic touch to your outdoor space. You can place this lovely rustic outdoor picnic table on the patio, in the garden, by the poolside, or in the backyard to savor a delightful meal or host an enjoyable outdoor gathering.
